aboutPage.title: About us
aboutPage.description: Swapo is a fashion marketplace built for simple buying and selling, with account tools that keep orders, addresses, support, and policies close at hand.

trusted.title: Trusted flow
trusted.description: Clear order states and support access.

simple.title: Simple account
simple.description: Everything important is grouped in one area.

secure.title: Secure details
secure.description: Profile and address data stay organized.

descriptions.orders: Incoming buyer orders will appear here with their fulfillment status.
descriptions.purchases: Purchases made from this account are shown in the same account area.
descriptions.addresses: Delivery addresses connected to this seller account are managed here.
descriptions.wallet: Balances, payouts, and wallet activity are grouped here.
descriptions.drafts: Unpublished listings and saved product drafts are collected here.
descriptions.subscriptions: Seller subscription plans and renewals are managed here.
descriptions.autoReplies: Automatic replies for buyer messages are configured here.
descriptions.businessLocation: Your commercial pickup and business location details are shown here.
descriptions.settings: Seller account preferences and controls are available here.
descriptions.about: Learn more about Swapo and the marketplace experience.
descriptions.policy: Usage policies and selling rules are available here.
descriptions.support: Support contact options for seller account help are shown here.

becomeSeller.title: Start selling on Swapo
becomeSeller.description: Upgrade your account to a seller and start listing your products.

phonePage.title: Edit phone number
phonePage.info: To change your phone number, please contact support.

addressesPage.title: My addresses
addressesPage.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this address?

empty.title: No addresses yet
empty.message: Add an address to make ordering easier.

supportPage.title: Technical support
supportPage.description: Need help? We're here for you.

policyPage.title: Usage policy
policyPage.intro: By using the Swapo platform, you agree to the terms and policies outlined below.

usage.title: Terms of use
usage.body: Users are required to use the platform legally and ethically, and must not post content that violates regulations or public decency.

privacy.title: Privacy and data protection
privacy.body: We are committed to protecting your personal data and do not share it with third parties except for service operation purposes.

transactions.title: Financial transactions
transactions.body: All payments are processed through secure, certified payment gateways. Swapo is not responsible for any transactions outside the platform.

disputes.title: Dispute resolution
disputes.body: In the event of a dispute between a buyer and seller, please contact technical support to resolve the issue.

notFound.title: Product not found
notFound.message: This product may have been removed or is not available right now.

gallery.title: Product media
gallery.emptyMessage: This product does not have images yet.

description.title: Product description
description.empty: No description has been added for this product yet.

unavailable.message: This product is currently unavailable, so buyer actions are disabled.

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.emptyMessage: Reviews will appear here after buyers rate this seller.

related.title: Related products
related.emptyMessage: More related products will appear as the catalog grows.

page.title: Favorites
page.description: Keep your saved Swapo finds in one place, then browse them by category, condition, price, and listing type.

empty.title: No favorites yet
empty.message: Products you save will appear here so you can come back to them quickly.
empty.filteredMessage: Try changing the search term, category, or filters to find a saved product.

cart.title: Your cart
cart.shippingNotice: Shipping fees are calculated at payment after order confirmation

empty.title: Your cart is empty
empty.message: Items you add to your cart will appear here before checkout.

status.checkoutUnavailable: Checkout is not available in this demo yet.

empty.title: Your cart is empty
empty.message: Add products to your cart before completing the order.

standard.title: Standard shipping

status.addressMissing: Add a delivery address before confirming your order.
status.shippingMissing: Choose a shipping method before confirming your order.
status.orderPlaceholder: Order confirmation is saved locally for this demo.

comments.excellentCondition: The item arrived in excellent condition and matched the listing photos.
comments.fastDelivery: Smooth experience, fast delivery, and the seller was very responsive.
comments.matchesPhotos: The piece looked exactly like the photos and the sizing note was helpful.
comments.cleanPackaging: Clean packaging and a clear description. I would buy from this seller again.
comments.quickReply: Quick replies and careful handling from start to finish.
comments.carefulListing: The details were accurate, and the item arrived ready to wear.
